# Release Checklist

Use this checklist before cutting a release.

- [ ] C++ repository build workflow is green
- [ ] Python wrapper build workflow is green
- [ ] ROS1 wrapper build workflow is green
- [ ] ROS2 wrapper build workflow is green
- [ ] All P0 test cases passed
- [ ] Docs link checks passed
- [ ] Examples compile checks passed
- [ ] API/Example/Doc/Test mapping has no new P0 gaps
- [ ] Benchmark has no 3-sigma regression
- [ ] KNOWN_ISSUES.md has been updated
- [ ] Release notes reviewed
